# ccstatus

> ccstatus is a fast status line for Claude Code: a single Rust binary that renders
> your model, context window, and both rate-limit windows (5-hour and 7-day) as
> hi-res braille bars, with last-known usage cached and shown instantly on session
> start. No network calls, no auth, no runtime dependencies.

## Install
- Homebrew: brew install morsechimwai/tap/ccstatus
- npm: npm install -g ccstatus-cli
- Cargo: cargo install ccstatus

## Configure
Add to ~/.claude/settings.json:
"statusLine": { "type": "command", "command": "ccstatus", "padding": 1 }

## Facts
- License: MIT. Platforms: macOS, Linux, Windows.
- Shows aggregate 5-hour and 7-day rate-limit windows plus context-window usage.
- Colors, bar glyph (braille or block), labels, and rows are configurable via config.toml.
- Source: https://github.com/morsechimwai/claude-status-line
